segments.text: Then Jonah prayed to the Lord his God from the fish's belly.
I cried out to the Lord because of my affliction, And He answered me. Out of the belly of Sheol I cried, And You heard my voice.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: For You cast me into the deep, Into the heart of the seas, And the floods surrounded me; All Your billows and Your waves passed over me.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: I have been cast out of Your sight; Yet I will look again toward Your holy temple.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: The waters surrounded me, even to my soul; The deep closed around me; Weeds were wrapped around my head.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: I went down to the moorings of the mountains; The earth with its bars closed behind me forever; Yet You have brought up my life from the pit, O Lord, my God.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: When my soul fainted within me, I remembered the Lord; And my prayer went up to You, Into Your holy temple.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: Those who regard worthless idols Forsake their own Mercy.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: But I will sacrifice to You With the voice of thanksgiving; I will pay what I have vowed. Salvation is of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Jonah

segments.text: So the Lord spoke to the fish, and it vomited Jonah onto dry land.
